name: Dr. Sameer Bhatia
bio: Dr. Sameer Bhatia leads the Future Networks Lab where he designs software-defined networking controllers for multi-tenant data centers with guaranteed quality-of-service. His work on delay-bounded network slicing for 5G core networks has been adopted by a tier-1 Indian telecom operator. He developed an intent-based networking framework that uses natural language policies to configure network paths, bridging the gap between operator intent and low-level SDN rules. His group maintains a 40-node SDN testbed used for teaching and collaborative research across three institutions.
